---
layout: layouts/cryptomator.html
title: Cryptomator. Transparent client-side encryption
metaDesc: Cyberduck for mounting volumes in the file explorer. Available for Mac and Windows.
permalink: /cryptomator/
lede: |
  <p class="alt-lede"><img src="/images/logo-cryptomator.svg" alt="Cryptomator" style="float:right;width:150px;">Secure your data on any server or cloud storage to prevent unauthorized access regardless of infrastructure. File and directory names are encrypted, directory structures are obfuscated. Unlike disk encryption utilities, each file is individually encrypted.</p>
---

## Advantages over other encryption

<br>

<div data-layout="flex">

<div>
<h3>Open Source</h3>
<p data-size="s">Independently audited. No backdoors or hidden vulnerabilities. No online service required.</p>
</div>

<div>
<h3>Filename encryption</h3>
<p data-size="s">File and directory names are encrypted, directory structures are obfuscated.</p>
</div>

<div>
<h3>File content encryption</h3>
<p data-size="s">Unlike disk encryption utilities, each file is individually encrypted.</p>
</div>

</div>

<tr>
<th scope="row">Version</th>
<td>6</td>
<td>2</td>

<td>1.9.1</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<th scope="row">Interoperable with Cryptomator</th>
<td><img src="/images/icon-tick.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Yes</span></td>

</tr>

<tr>

<td><img src="/images/icon-tick.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Yes</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-partial.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Partial</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-cross.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">No</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-tick.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Yes</span></td>
</tr>

<tr>
<th scope="row">No account required</th>
<td><img src="/images/icon-tick.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Yes</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-tick.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Yes</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-cross.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">No</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-tick.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Yes</span></td>
</tr>

<tr>
<th scope="row">Client side encryption of file contents</th>
<td><img src="/images/icon-tick.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Yes</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-tick.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Yes</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-tick.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Yes</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-tick.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Yes</span></td>
</tr>

<tr>
<th scope="row">Client side encryption of filenames</th>
<td><img src="/images/icon-tick.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Yes</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-tick.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Yes</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-partial.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Partial</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-cross.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">No</span></td>
</tr>

<tr>
<th scope="row">Obfuscation of directory tree</th>
<td><img src="/images/icon-tick.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Yes</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-tick.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Yes</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-cross.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">No</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-cross.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">No</span></td>
</tr>

<tr>
<th scope="row">No known security flaws</th>
<td><img src="/images/icon-tick.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Yes</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-tick.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Yes</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-tick.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Yes</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-cross.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">No</span></td>
</tr>

<tr>
<th scope="row">Browse remote files</th>
<td><img src="/images/icon-tick.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Yes</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-tick.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Yes</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-cross.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">No</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-cross.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">No</span></td>
</tr>

<tr>
<th scope="row">Access files in Finder (macOS) or Explorer (Windows)</th>
<td><img src="/images/icon-cross.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">No</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-tick.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Yes</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-tick.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Yes</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-tick.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Yes</span></td>
</tr>

<tr>
<th scope="row">Provider and protocol independent implementation</th>

<td><img src="/images/icon-tick.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Yes</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-cross.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">No</span></td>
<td><img src="/images/icon-tick.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Yes</span></td>
</tr>

<tr>
<th scope="row">Installation requires no administrator privilege</th>
<td><img src="/images/icon-tick.svg" alt="" width="32"> <span data-visibility="hidden">Yes</span></td>
